surface_verification.justification: Behavior-preserving dependency lockfile bumps (cryptography in shipwright-plan/uv.lock; ws in shipwright-test/scripts/perf/package-lock.json) to remediate SCA CVEs. No web/api/cli/UI/store surface is introduced or changed. Regression is verified by the shipwright-plan unit suite (37/37) against the bumped lock + an import smoke; the empirical CVE re-scan runs in the PR's security.yml CI (Trivy).

degraded: Full monorepo suite (prev iterate: 3539 unit / 169 integration) delegated to CI ci.yml. This change's blast radius is isolated: cryptography is pinned only in shipwright-plan's own uv.lock (per-plugin venvs, so other plugins' resolved deps are unchanged), and the perf package-lock is a JS Lighthouse-runner artifact with no Python tests. Local scoped regression gate = shipwright-plan suite 37/37 + cryptography/google-auth import smoke.

behaviors.behavior: cryptography in shipwright-plan/uv.lock is pinned at a non-vulnerable version (>=48.0.1) -> clears GHSA-537c-gmf6-5ccf (vulnerable OpenSSL in cryptography wheels)
behaviors.evidence: uv.lock now pins cryptography 49.0.0 (>= fix 48.0.1); single version line changed, no other package added/removed/edged; import smoke (cryptography 49.0.0 + google.auth + default_backend()) OK

behaviors.behavior: ws in shipwright-test/scripts/perf/package-lock.json is pinned at non-vulnerable versions for BOTH installs (root + lighthouse subtree) -> clears CVE-2026-48779 (trivy-0003 + trivy-0004)
behaviors.evidence: package-lock jq: node_modules/ws=8.21.0 and node_modules/lighthouse/node_modules/ws=7.5.11 (both on the Trivy fixed list 5.2.5/6.2.4/7.5.11/8.21.0); only ws version lines changed in the lockfile

behaviors.behavior: the cryptography 48->49 major bump introduces no regression in shipwright-plan (its only consumer; transitive via google-auth)
behaviors.evidence: uv --extra dev pytest tests/ -> 37 passed in 1.19s against the bumped lock
